text:
data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for safety need 
1 = Screened positive for safety need 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variable considers the four safety screening questions that begin with “SR_CORE_SFTY_*”: 
SR_CORE_SFTY_1_CD, SR_CORE_SFTY_2_CD, SR_CORE_SFTY_3_CD, and SR_CORE_SFTY_4_CD. This 
field is “1” if the sum of the four safety questions is 11 or higher. 

Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
